evals.name: template-with-data-jvm
evals.prompt: Create a JVM dashboard so I can monitor my Java service.
evals.expected_output: Agent calls signoz_list_dashboard_templates, picks the JVM template entry, runs the no-data pre-flight (signoz_list_metrics for jvm.*), finds data is flowing, and proceeds to call signoz_import_dashboard with no warning.

evals.name: template-no-data-postgres
evals.prompt: Create a dashboard for my PostgreSQL database.
evals.expected_output: Agent calls signoz_list_dashboard_templates, picks the postgresql template entry, runs the no-data pre-flight (signoz_list_metrics for postgresql.*), finds no data, warns the user verbatim with the prompt from SKILL.md Step 3b-i.1, and waits for confirmation before calling signoz_import_dashboard.

evals.name: broad-request-apm-category
evals.prompt: I need an APM dashboard - what do you have?
evals.expected_output: Agent recognises the request is broad. Calls signoz_list_dashboard_templates with category='Apm' to enumerate APM templates, presents them to the user, and asks the user to pick before calling signoz_import_dashboard.
